result.markdown: --- title: "Week 10: Metaprogramming" --- ::: {.cell} ::: ## Main reference * [17-20 *Advanced R*](https://adv-r.hadley.nz/metaprogramming.html) ## What you will learn this week * Non-standard evaluation (changing the expression or environment) * Abstract syntax trees * tidyselect * Symbols, expressions, quosures (names, calls, calls+environments) * Parsing and evaluating code ## Pre-class activities * Watch [Lazy evaluation](https://youtu.be/2BXPLnLMTYo) with Jenny Bryan * Watch [Data mask programming patterns](https://youtu.be/jGfuTuq44fE) ## Slides for week Download pdf ## Assignments * [Assignment 3](../assignments/A3.qmd) is due on Tuesday 02 June.
